parent.name: Isiah Maxwell
parent.bio: Isiah Maxwell was born on 28 March 1989 in Cleveland, Ohio. Isiah is recognized as one of the best up and coming talents in the business and is known for his muscular physique, clean-cut look and his huge following amongst younger female fans. Isiah got into porn after he undertook a field study in the adult industry while he was a student at Cal State University. After working as an intern for a week, Isiah knew he wanted to have a career in adult film but he also decided to wait a while because he “wanted to do it right”. After networking in the industry for a year by attending conventions, getting to know directors and reaching out to performers, Isiah decided to commence a career in adult film as a publicist and agent. He began performing soon after. Isiah has worked extensively in America, Europe and Japan and says that he loves working in the industry because he gets to bang some of the most beautiful women in the world while also travelling and experiencing incredible things. He says that the most rewarding part of his job is when fans appreciate his work. He says that staying in peak condition is almost a full-time job, but that it’s all worth it in the end when he watches the final product. Isiah’s mentor is Prince Yahshua, who he looks up to as a positive role-model in the industry. When he isn’t getting paid to rail some of the hottest women on earth, Isiah enjoys hanging out with his nephews, looking after his two dogs, hitting the gym and working on his business and personal development goals. He currently lives in LA with his two dogs.
